siteAbout.metaDescription: Toldotay preserves family legacy with precision—from the root down. Our vision, story, and top-down approach to lineage.
siteAbout.heroTitle: Toldotay – Preserving the Past, Rooting the Future
siteAbout.section1Body: The "Toldotay" system was born from a profound realization: a family story is much more than a sequence of names and dates; it is the foundation upon which the identity of future generations is built. In a digital world where information is often lost or becomes cluttered and unverified, we created Toldotay to provide families with a sacred, precise, and protected space to preserve their legacy.
siteAbout.section2Body: The concept grew from the need for a living "Family Encyclopedia." We observed how many family trees, over time, turn into a chaotic blend of data where the core lineage is lost among unrelated side branches. We realized that what was missing was a tool focused on the Root—the solid infrastructure from which everything grew.
siteAbout.section3Title: The Toldotay Difference: Precision from the Foundation Down
siteAbout.section3Body: Toldotay's philosophy is different from anything you've experienced. We believe in a "Top-Down" approach. The system is specifically engineered for family lineages that demand exemplary order and a clear hierarchical structure. Unlike other platforms that allow "data pollution" by adding lateral family connections that don't belong to the core dynasty, Toldotay safeguards the integrity of your tree. Our focus is on the direct and authentic lineage. We provide the stable infrastructure that allows you to build your family tree in a controlled manner, ensuring that every person added is an integral part of the true family narrative.
siteAbout.section4Body: Our ultimate goal is to bridge the gap between the past and the future. Toldotay allows you to ensure that your children and grandchildren will not only know the names of their ancestors but will understand exactly where they came from. Thanks to our precise framework, your heritage is preserved in a clean and honorable way—one that will stand the test of time and continue to grow alongside your family.
siteAbout.section5Title: How to connect your family tree to your account
siteAbout.section5Body:
To join an existing family tree, you must first register on the platform.
Once registered, ask the tree owner to share their tree number — the number that appears in the URL when they view their family tree.

Enter that number in the designated field on the homepage, and the tree will be linked to your account.

Want to make edits?
Click "Request Edit Access" — the tree owner will receive a notification and can approve your request.
siteAbout.contactCredit: The system was built by Benny Shor

treeDelete.dangerZoneBody: Deletion is irreversible — the tree cannot be recovered once deleted.

familyDiscovery.discoverButton: 🔍 Discover new family members with AI

meta.title: Toldotay | Writing the Future
meta.description: A digital family tree for names, memories, photos, and AI biographies, built for Hebrew-first families and designed to reach the living-room screen.

hero.title:
Every family is a story.

Now it has a home.
hero.subtitle: Toldotay is a digital family tree that builds your story - names, photos, memories, AI-based biographies - and brings it to grandma and grandpa's living-room screen. One gift. Whole generations.

blogBanner.title: Stories worth <accent>reading</accent>.
blogBanner.subtitle: On roots, on AI, and on how names tucked away in a drawer become living family memory. The latest posts from the Toldotay blog.

illustrations.digital-family: A digital family - in the living room
illustrations.gift: The gift worth more than all the rest

features.title: Not just a tree. <accent>A living story.</accent>
features.subtitle: Built especially for Hebrew-speaking families - with Hebrew names, Hebrew dates, and AI biographies grounded in real sources.

bilingual.title: Bilingual in Hebrew and English
bilingual.description: Every person can be stored in Hebrew and English, with Gregorian and Hebrew dates. Children abroad can read it, while grandparents still see the names they remember.

ai.title: AI biographies from real sources
ai.description: Add a grandparent's name and Toldotay can look through Wikipedia, MyHeritage, and rabbinic genealogy books, then draft a personal biography in Hebrew with cited sources.

family.title: The whole family joins in
family.description: Invite aunts, cousins, and siblings so each person can add their piece. Built-in permissions decide who edits, who only views, and what guests can see.

scenario.title: In the end, it is <accent>on grandpa and grandma's TV</accent>.
scenario.description: Toldotay is not meant to live only on a phone. It is built for the biggest screen in the house - a slow loop of faces, names, stories, and Hebrew birthdays, so visiting kids can see themselves on the wall.

stepOne.text: You build the tree - from your phone, in 5 minutes. Names, photos, and who belongs to whom.

stepTwo.text: The family adds more - an aunt in the US uploads an old photo. A cousin writes a story.

stepThree.text: Grandma and grandpa watch - the living-room screen loops through the family, all the time.

finalCta.title:
Your story

starts today.
finalCta.subtitle: Free to start. No credit card. Your first family tree can be up in under 5 minutes, even from a phone.

footer.description: A digital family tree built for Hebrew-speaking families who want to preserve the story - not only the names.
